Body.Content:
Get a clear, centralized view of how Interpreter is used across your organization. Monitor adoption, track usage trends, and understand costs—all in one place. Designed for tenant admins, it helps you stay in control, optimize performance, and confidently scale Interpreter across your teams.

GA date: July CY2026

message.Title: Microsoft Teams: Tenant-level dashboard for Interpreter
